showcase.title: Algorithmic News Feeds and Misinformation Susceptibility
showcase.desc: Sequential explanatory mixed-methods proposal on algorithmic exposure, trust, and misinformation vulnerability among Dhaka university students.

showcase.title: Platform Studies and Epistemic Equity
showcase.desc: A literature-review project connecting platform power, information inequality, and Global South knowledge production.

showcase.title: Team Data Decoder
showcase.desc: Collaborative data-journalism capstone with a reproducible evidence trail and publishable public-interest narrative.

showcase.title: Convergence Communication I - Video Project
showcase.desc: A video-first coursework project exploring how reporting, scripting, shooting, and editing converge into a single story package.

showcase.title: Convergence Communication II - Video Project
showcase.desc: Second convergence video project, extending the workflow into tighter production planning, post-production, and audience-facing packaging.

showcase.title: Digital Audience Mapping Portfolio
showcase.desc: Audience-behaviour coursework focused on digital attention, engagement signals, and how platform metrics shape editorial choices.

showcase.title: Media Law Case Briefs
showcase.desc: Case-led portfolio on media regulation, rights, and legal constraints around journalism practice in Bangladesh.

showcase.title: Communication and Technology Essay
showcase.desc: Analytical coursework on the social consequences of communication technologies and the politics embedded in technical systems.

showcase.title: Grassroots Economic Development Field Notes
showcase.course: SSC3150 - Seminar on Grassroots Economic Development
showcase.desc: Social-science coursework on community economies, development practice, and how local institutions negotiate scarcity.

showcase.title: Investigative Journalism II Dossier
showcase.desc: Reserved showcase slot for the advanced investigation portfolio currently in progress.
